_comment: CHAMPION v16 on 2b89b33: v15 king-recipe (epoch-perm sampler + batch1024 + muon0.025 + max_lr3e-3 + WSD0.55/0.45 + best-ckpt, tied canonical/op4-safe) PLUS two edges to close the -0.0139 gap to king: (1) LAWA weight-averaging (lawa_frac 0.2 = average last 20% tail snapshots, KEEP only if it beats best-ckpt on held-out -> can only help, no new keys), (2) fresh seed 8888 (independent draw; v15 seed 1337 landed 0.0139 behind king's 7777). 5200 steps/2.73B tok.
